name: Team SMG4 RPG | ➹
description:
WELCOME TO: SMG4 TEAM RPG

➹ This RPG is made for people who really want to interact with their team and characters from there. So you can have fun

➹ There are all the main SMG4 team and their information, + Mr. Puzzles as a villain for more interesting plots for you

[SFW/NSFW]

➹ PLEASE BEFORE RP go to the chat room and set in: "CHAT MEMORY" - WRITE HOW PERSONS ARE RELATING TO YOU BY STATUS. THIS IS TO MAKE BOTS FORGET WHO AND FOR WHOM YOU ARE

➹ ! I do not guarantee that the bot will start playing on your behalf, because, unfortunately, I can not fix it. !

___

UPDATE 05/18/2026: Well

It's probably been a long time since I created the bot, so I decided to make a small update. I tried to fix all the errors, added additional information about locations, missing characters (+ some background ones), and updated a couple of initial posts.🥹
